textPlain: When is the last time you went to one of these shows and left happy with the experience? It has been a decade or so for me.Hard to care what happens to a company like TicketMaster. As you build your company, ask yourself how they ended up like this. Do you think the founders had this outcome in mind when they started?
There is no reason that event tickets couldn't be sold similarly to airline seats.
The issue that spawned scalping and Ticketmaster is that musicians want to sell tickets under their market value. There's no analogous issue with airline pricing.
Expand on what you mean by that?
